task_completion.description: Verify that a new log of type 'Harvest' is being created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows a log creation or edit form within farmOS Field Kit with 'Harvest' selected as the log type or prominently displayed as the form title.

task_completion.description: Verify the date is set to May 12, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date picker or date input field displays 'May 12, 2024' or the ISO format '2024-05-12'.

task_completion.description: Verify the notes contain the specified text about the Romney flock shearing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or notes field contains the exact text: 'Spring shearing of Romney demonstration flock. 12 ewes sheared. Fleeces skirted heavily to remove vegetable matter (VM). Wool quality is excellent with high crimp. Stored in paper sacks in the dry barn loft.'

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity value is set to 98.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric input field for quantity shows the number '98'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity unit is set to 'lbs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A unit input field or dropdown associated with the quantity shows 'lbs'.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity label is set to 'Greasy Wool'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A label input field associated with the quantity shows 'Greasy Wool'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine farmOS Field Kit UI (web or mobile app interface), not a generic text editor, notepad, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows or command prompts showing curl commands, database injections, or script executions used to create the log.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the appropriate individual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text, numbers, and dates are visible inside their respective standard input fields, textareas, or dropdowns within the app's form, rather than pasted as a single block of text into a single field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Harvest log in farmOS Field Kit. The date should be May 12, 2024 (or 2024-05-12). The quantity is 98, unit is 'lbs', and label is 'Greasy Wool' (the correct industry term for raw, unwashed wool). The notes must mention 'Romney' (a real sheep breed) and 'Fleeces skirted heavily' (skirting is a standard wool processing step to remove vegetable matter).
